description: Fires once when the marketing page mounts. Top of the conversion funnel.
Fires on any primary signup CTA ("Lock in €39") click. Properties: cta, location, lang, device.
Fires when the "Book a demo" button is clicked from hero section.
Fires on the client after a successful demo booking form submission. Properties: has_email, lang.
Server-side event fired after a valid demo request is written to Firestore. Properties: agency_name, has_email, has_message.
